## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.6

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Restores SBS50/SBS550 alarm volume when X-Sense reports `alarmVol`, using the same settings shadow path as alarm tone.
- Routes detector LED light writes through the shared APK-style settings shadow helper instead of the older hand-built switch payload.
- Marks raw `CO Level` as a diagnostic code while keeping ppm values on the CO concentration sensors.
- Updates the release workflow so full releases are explicitly marked as the latest GitHub release.

### 📚 Docs
- Adds an entity changes page for user-visible entity behavior notes.
